creator: qjail1@a1poweruser.com
text:
Host running ipfliter.  Trying to start pf from rc.conf. Get same error when issuing "service pf start" command from inside of vimage jail. 

kldload: can't load pf: Operation not permitted
/etc/rc.d/pf: WARNING: Unable to load kernel module pf

Jul  4 04:44:20 kernel: nd6_dad_timer: cancel DAD on epair3a because 
of ND6_IFF_IFDISABLED.
